meta.title: Flux AI Completely DESTROYS Midjourney (AI Image Generator)
meta.description:
Flux AI Completely DESTROYS Midjourney (free AI Image Generator)

In this video I give you an in depth Flux AI tutorial. A new AI image generator that might be the best Midjourney Alternative. In this video I show you a full Tutorial of how to use Flux1 AI to generate ai  images and also how to make ai generated images of your own face. 

With these 3 methods you can use Flux AI for free, but if you want their pro and most advanced model on fal ai then you need to add balance to your account. Compared to other tools like Midjourney Flux is pretty cheap and very powerful. 

Links mentioned:
Huggingface https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-dev
Replicate https://replicate.com/black-forest-labs/flux-dev 
Fal ai https://fal.ai/models/fal-ai/flux-pro
